message:
fix: replace hand-rolled TOML parser in formula.go with formula.ParseFile

The cmd/formula.go file had a fragile hand-rolled TOML parser using string
splitting that broke on edge cases (multiline values, escaped quotes,
nested sections). Replaced with the proper formula.ParseFile which uses
BurntSushi/toml. Removed duplicate formulaData/formulaLeg/formulaSynthesis
types in favor of formula.Formula.

Fixes gt-gt446

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
